{"command":"for i in $(seq 1 120); do
  HTTP_CODE=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000 2>/dev/null || echo "000")
  if echo "$HTTP_CODE" | grep -qE "^[23]"; then
    echo "Dev server ready (HTTP $HTTP_CODE) after ${i}s"
    break
  fi
  if ! kill -0 16225 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "Dev server process died. Last 20 lines of log:"
    tail -20 /tmp/dev-server.log
    break
  fi
  sleep 1
done","description":"Wait for dev server to be ready","timeout":130000}
